headings.usage: H1, H2, Room Titles, Hero text

accents.usage: Signatures, 'Hello Sunshine.', 'made quietly, on purpose', small notes

body.usage: Paragraphs, navigation labels, standard UI text

navigation.style: Slim glass pill, rounded-full, fixed left, translucent backdrop blur
navigation.elements: Infinity symbol at top, room icons below

world_switcher.style: Extremely quiet, minimal text/opacity changes (My World / Buddy's World / Our World)

layout.spacing: Generous, breathable, avoiding any cramped UI. Minimum p-8 in containers.

ambient_lighting.moon_orb: Soft glowing radial gradient orb placed strategically in background (Home, Good Night)
ambient_lighting.butterflies: Floating small dim butterflies drifting in background with subtle css animation

textures.grain: SVG noise overlay or CSS grain to reduce digital flatness and give a timeless feel

motion.timing: Slow, gentle, calm timing curves. transition-all duration-700 ease-in-out
motion.page_transitions: Fade in, extremely subtle vertical drift (translate-y-4 to 0)
motion.hover_states: Soft glow, slight opacity increase, no abrupt scaling

components.auth_pages: Centered glass panel, serene background, minimal inputs with bottom-border only or very subtle rounded glass inputs.
components.cards: Glassmorphism panels (Achievements, Letters), translucent blur with subtle border.
components.inputs: Shadcn highly customized. Transparent backgrounds with white/10 borders.
components.buddy_system: Buddy-pair system components should treat every account as equal (no creator/visitor hierarchy).

image_urls.description: Soft moon or light orb for background atmospheric lighting
Dark star/grain texture for background overlay

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT REDESIGN VISUAL LANGUAGE. Preserve everything according to this JSON strictly.
Build standard HTML/Tailwind for custom layouts rather than rigid Shadcn cards. Create raw divs with backdrop-blur-xl and bg-white/5 for cards.
Apply background gradient: bg-gradient-to-br from-[#0a1228] to-[#1a2647] on the body/main wrapper.
Include an SVG noise filter or a repeating-linear-gradient with grain to give the background texture.
The left navigation should be a slim, pill-shaped fixed column on the left (e.g., w-16 or w-20, rounded-full, glassmorphism).
Use framer-motion for the slow floating butterflies and smooth, calm page transitions.
Typography: Import Cormorant Garamond for headings, Caveat for accents, and Manrope for body text from Google Fonts.
Build the Studio Mode ('Writing For Varun' / 'Preview Sunshine\'s World') seamlessly within the same aesthetic.
Ensure the World Switcher is quiet and text-based with subtle active states (e.g. opacity 100% vs 50%).
Every interactive element MUST include data-testid attributes.
Keep spacing very generous. Use minimum p-8 in containers.
